# U-God — World Religions & Sacred Texts

## About
U-God.com is a world religions and sacred texts resource covering major traditions including Islam, Christianity, Judaism, Hinduism, Buddhism, Taoism, Confucianism, and more. We make religious wisdom accessible through thoughtful articles, a scripture library, and comparative tools.

## Topics
- World religions (Islam, Christianity, Judaism, Hinduism, Buddhism, Taoism, Jainism, Zoroastrianism, Shinto)
- Sacred texts (Quran, Bible, Torah, Talmud, Bhagavad Gita, Tao Te Ching, Gospel of Thomas)
- Comparative religion
- Religious holidays and calendar
- Meditation and spiritual practice
- Sacred wisdom and philosophy
- Religious history
